creator: kristinacors
caption: 3 Spots I Can Almost Guarantee You Didn’t Know Existed in Puerto Rico (Especially The Last One) & Why You Should Travel There! Let me know in the comments if you were surprised about these spots in PR! #travelbucketlist #latina #visitpuertorico #badbunny #superbowlhalftimeshow

transcription.text: In honor of Bad Bunny performing at the Super Bowl and being a proud Puerto Rican and Dominican American, here are three reasons why you need to visit Puerto Rico and I can guarantee you probably didn't even know about these places. Number one, Puerto Rico has these magical bioluminescent bays where the water basically glows when you move it. They glow because the bays have these tiny little microorganisms and whenever you bump into them, they light up as a defense reaction. Puerto Rico has three of these bays. Mosquito Bay is one of the brightest in the world and then there's two others, Laguna Grande and La Paguera. They have night kayaking tours which is super incredible and a pro tip is actually to go during a new moon where there's less moonlight and the glow of the bay is actually brighter. Number two, Puerto Rico is so much more than its beautiful beaches. In the Cabo Rojo National Wildlife Refuge, they actually have pink salt flats. So the lagoon gets this gorgeous pink color because of a combination of algae, salt, water, and bacteria. Honestly, it can look pink, red, or different shades of pastel depending on the weather and of course it looks its pinkest during sunny dry conditions. And third, it's home to hidden caves like Cueva Ventana, a giant natural window carved into a mountainside that opens up into valley views. So be honest, did you know about these spots in Puerto Rico? Let me know in the comments and like this video if you're excited about Bad Bunny's performance at the Super Bowl.
